data.title: Add Phase 0.5 doc-folder scan to onboarding SKILL.md (--doc-folder param, scan-docs.sh invocation, elevation-only CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT update)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
This is the main SKILL.md instruction file change. Phase 0.5 runs between Phase 0 (Comfort Assessment) and Phase 1 (Auto-Detection). It is optional — only runs when --doc-folder is specified. Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5, tests for SKILL.md are structural marker tests (already updated in T5).

## What to Build
In `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md`, add a new Phase 0.5 section inserted between Phase 0 Step 0.4 and the Batch Group Protocol section:

### New Section: Phase 0.5: Document Folder Pre-Scan (/dso:onboarding)

**Trigger**: Run ONLY when `--doc-folder <path>` is specified on the onboarding invocation. If omitted, skip this phase entirely and proceed to Phase 1.

**Goal**: Before asking any questions, scan the user-specified document folder for structured facts (app name, stack signals, WCAG requirements, framework mentions). Update the CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT object with any elevated confidence levels found.

**Step 0.5.1: Parse --doc-folder Parameter**
Document how the agent should accept the optional --doc-folder flag from the user's invocation and validate it is a non-empty string before proceeding.

**Step 0.5.2: Invoke scan-docs.sh**
```bash
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
# Write current CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT to a temp file for elevation input
CONTEXT_TEMP=$(mktemp /tmp/onboarding-context-XXXXXX.json)
# (extract JSON from $SCRATCHPAD_PHASE0 written in Step 0.4)
# ...parse and write to $CONTEXT_TEMP...

SCAN_OUT=$(bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/scan-docs.sh" "$DOC_FOLDER" --context-file="$CONTEXT_TEMP" 2>/tmp/scan-docs-warn.txt)
SCAN_EXIT=$?
```

Document that:
- If scan-docs.sh exits non-zero (path error), log the error to scratchpad and skip this phase (do not abort onboarding)
- Binary/large file skips are logged to /tmp/scan-docs-warn.txt — agent may surface these to the user as a brief note
- SKIP:binary and SKIP:size messages indicate files that were skipped (log to scratchpad, mention to user: "Note: N files were skipped (binary or too large)")

**Step 0.5.3: Parse Facts and Update CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT**
Document how to:
- Parse SCAN_OUT JSON to extract `facts` array and `elevated_dimensions` map
- For each elevated dimension, apply elevation-only update to the CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT in $SCRATCHPAD_PHASE0: `new_level = max(existing_level, elevated_level)` where `high > medium > low`
- Never lower any dimension (contract requirement from confidence-context.md)
- Append a `## DOC_SCAN_FACTS` section to the scratchpad with the extracted facts (for Phase 2 routing to consume)
- Display a brief summary to the user: "Found N facts in your documents (app name, stack, WCAG level, etc.) — I'll use these to pre-fill answers where possible."

**Step 0.5.4: File Count Cap Warning**
Document: if scan output includes `WARNING:file_cap_reached`, surface to user: "Note: Document scan processed the first 50 files. Additional files in the folder were not read."

**Error handling**: wrap all of Phase 0.5 in a guard — if any step fails (parse error, missing binary, permission denied), log to scratchpad and continue to Phase 1 without Phase 0.5 output. Phase 0.5 failure must never abort onboarding.

**PHASE_PLAN update**: When Phase 0.5 runs, add it to PHASE_PLAN between Phase 0 and Phase 1. When it is skipped, do not add it.

**Security note**: document that `DOC_FOLDER` is passed directly to scan-docs.sh which validates it — the SKILL.md step must not attempt additional path resolution before this.

## TDD Requirement
Tests in T5 (test-onboarding-skill.sh Phase 0.5 structural marker tests) must pass after this task.
Run: `bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains "Phase 0.5" section header
  Verify: grep -q 'Phase 0\.5' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents "--doc-folder" parameter
  Verify: grep -q '\-\-doc-folder' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references scan-docs.sh invocation
  Verify: grep -q 'scan-docs\.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents elevation-only rule for CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT updates
  Verify: grep -qiE 'elevat' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents skip logging for binary/large files
  Verify: grep -qiE 'SKIP:|file-type guard|binary.*skip|skip.*binary' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] All T5 structural marker tests pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] All previously passing test-onboarding-skill.sh tests continue to pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
